entities.name: V

entities.name: Focus Blocks
entities.context: Structured approach to focused work with specific constraints

entities.name: Environment as Hardware
entities.context: Belief that clutter/noise has outsized cognitive cost for V

entities.name: Deep Work
entities.context: Extended focused work periods, capped at 3-4 hours max

entities.name: Active Recovery
entities.context: Recovery through movement (walking) rather than passive screen time

entities.name: COMT Vulnerability
entities.context: Genetic factor affecting dopamine metabolism that links sleep to focus capacity

relationships.context: Clutter and noise cost more for V than average person
